conservative.name: Elucidate
conservative.requirements: Your target must be able to hear you

success.description: You utilize your superior education to clearly explain to your target why it is in his own best interest to do as you suggest. You influence the target
As above, plus the target's stance is moved one space toward a neutral stance

boon.description: The target loses 1 Cunning die from his budget (if any)

bane.description: Add to your next Social action against the target

sigmarsComet.description: Your explanation was especially cogent. If appropriate, and if you succeeded on the check, you influence the target again

reckless.name: Obfuscate
reckless.requirements: Your target must be able to hear you

success.description: You utilize your superior education to confuse and bewilder your target into doing as you suggest. You influence the target
As above, plus the target draws an insanity from the deck. I fit has either the Enigma or Trauma trait, the target suffers from its effects until the end of the current act. Otherwise, discard it.

boon.description: The target loses 1 Cunning die from his budget (if any)

bane.description: Add to your next Social action against the target

chaosStar.description: You confuse even yourself. Place a recharge token on each of your currently recharging action cards
